data.title: Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) declares $0.325 quarterly cash dividend per share, on 9,405,828 outstanding shares.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) revealed its Board of Directors' decision to approve a quarterly cash dividend of $0.325 per common share. This dividend will be paid out on November 10, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of October 27, 2025. The total count of common stock outstanding for the company stands at 9,405,828 shares as of the same date.

data.title: TRX at $0.31 tests lower Bollinger Band support following Bitcoin's dip, down 2.4% in 24 hours. Altcoins see sell-off amid 7.29% BTC decline.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON (TRX) is currently priced at $0.31, marking a 2.4% decrease in the past 24 hours. This decline has led TRON to test crucial support levels, a trend attributed to Bitcoin's 7.29% drop impacting altcoin markets.
S&P: France ratings lowered on heightened risks to budgetary consolidation.
S&P downgrades France to 'a+/a-1' from ‘aa-/a-1+'; outlook stble.

data.title: Markets react positively to trade easing and bank earnings surge. Powell hints at rate cut. Big banks excel, but smaller lenders show cracks.
data.description: Following the surprising announcement on Friday, Oct. 10, of 100% tariffs on Chinese goods by Donald Trump, the president quickly changed his stance, ensuring that trade relations "will be fine." This reassurance was well-received by markets, leading to a swift recovery on Wall Street at the beginning of the week. The recovery was further supported by strong bank earnings surpassing expectations and dovish comments from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Powell's concerns about increasing risks to employment hinted at the central bank's inclination towards further lowering borrowing costs, strengthening expectations for a rate cut later in the month. While major U.S. banks like JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS), Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC), Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C), and Wells Fargo & Co. (NYSE: WFC) performed well, cracks in smaller lenders began to emerge.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares declares $0.155 quarterly cash dividend on common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). Board of Directors announcement.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on October 17, 2025, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated shared news that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share for the company's stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). This amount remains consistent with the previous quarter's dividend payout.

data.title: Chord Energy to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov 4 after market close. Live webcast and call will follow.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Chord Energy Corp. (Nasdaq: CHRD) disclosed its intention to reveal the financial and operating outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 on November 4, 2025, post-market closing. The Company is set to conduct a live webcast and conference call following the release.

data.title: 4DMT granted 25,450 RSUs to 3 new non-executive employees on Oct. 14, 2025, under their Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: On October 14, 2025, in Emeryville, California, 4D Molecular Therapeutics announced that three new non-executive employees were granted 25,450 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) each. These RSUs were issued under the Company’s 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, approved by the board of directors in February 2025. This initiative falls under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market for equity grants designed to attract new talent to join the Company. 4D Molecular Therapeutics, listed on Nasdaq as FDMT, 4DMT, is a prominent late-stage biotechnology firm working on targeted therapeutics to revolutionize treatment methods for various diseases and deliver exceptional benefits to patients.

data.title: Jade Biosciences revealed new data on JADE101 at ASN Kidney Week 2025, presenting at the event.
data.description: Jade Biosciences unveiled new findings on JADE101 at the upcoming American Society of Nephrology Kidney Week 2025. The data presentations will highlight key insights and advancements related to JADE101. The announcement marks a significant step for the company as they continue to make strides in the field of nephrology. This presentation is set to showcase important numbers and statistics that demonstrate the efficacy and potential impact of JADE101. This event is expected to draw attention to Jade Biosciences and their innovative research in the kidney care sector, as they aim to address critical issues and offer solutions through their latest developments.

data.title: OFAL shareholders' meeting on Nov 5, 2025 to vote on 3 resolutions for growth. Los Angeles, Oct. 17.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, OFA Group revealed plans for its Annual Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for November 5, 2025. The meeting will see shareholders voting on three key strategic resolutions that aim to enhance the company's capital strategy, technological advancements, and governance structure in the long run.

data.title: Backblaze (Nasdaq: BLZE) to reveal Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, 2025. Conference call/webcast at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET).
data.description: Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE), a leading cloud storage company, is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on November 6 before the market opens. A conference call and webcast will follow at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to review the results. To join the webcast, visit: https://events.q4inc.com/attendee.

data.title: DoubleVerify to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 7, 2025. Conference call at 8 am ET. NYSE: DV.
data.description: In New York, DoubleVerify ("DV"), a prominent digital media measurement and analytics software platform listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DV, will be releasing its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Friday, November 7, 2025. The management team will be conducting a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET to delve into DV's financial performance, recent updates, and future prospects following the publication of the results. This event, titled "DoubleVerify Third Quarter 2025 Financ," aims to provide insight into the company's progress and outlook.

data.title: ATOM tests $3.16 support, down 3.07% in 24hrs. Technical signals hint at potential reversal near oversold levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $3.16, marking a 3.07% decrease in the last 24 hours. This decline has brought the price close to oversold levels near the Bollinger Band support. Technical indicators hint at a potential reversal in the near future.

data.title: Cytokinetics granted stock options and RSUs to 83 employees, totaling 109,120 shares and 73,535 RSUs.
data.description: Cytokinetics, Incorporated based in South San Francisco disclosed on October 17, 2025, that it has provided 109,120 stock options for purchasing common stock and 73,535 restricted stock units (RSUs), to a total of 83 new employees who started in September and October 2025. These stocks are granted to serve as a material incentive for their employment. The RSUs will be converted into common stock upon vesting.

data.title: Stampli recognized as P2P Leader by G2 with AI employee Billy, praised for integrations and support.
data.description: Stampli, a software company based in Mountain View, California, received positive feedback from finance teams for its intelligent automation features and smooth integration with ERP systems. The company's AI employee, Billy, efficiently handles procure-to-pay processes, earning praise for its exceptional support. The news was announced on October 17, 2025, showcasing the success of Stampli in enhancing P2P operations. This achievement reflects the company's commitment to providing innovative solutions in the finance sector.
